key_finding: DECISIVE NULL: 100% accuracy across ALL conditions (original=100%, synonym=100%, random=100%, n=215). Replacing ALL non-numeric tokens with random gibberish has ZERO effect. The <<EXPR=RESULT>> format makes English text completely redundant — model extracts answers from preserved numeric tokens. UNINFORMATIVE about hidden channel due to design confound. Consistent with probing: computation flows through numeric positions, not English words.
evidence_impact: Paraphrase disruption (Experiment B) is uninformative in the current format. The <<EXPR=RESULT>> calculator format creates a self-contained numeric channel that makes English text irrelevant. Neither pre-registered prediction branch was confirmed (both predicted SOME random-condition drop). Experiment needs redesign with plain-text CoT for a valid test. However, the null result COMPLEMENTS probing (exp_071-073): computation is at numeric positions, non-numeric tokens are scaffolding.
next_planned: Plain-text paraphrase disruption (without <<EXPR=RESULT>> format). Hidden-state baseline at expression positions. Paired permutation test for V vs expr-embed. Step-reordering disruption test.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: PROBING: V R=0.977 at computation positions (Qwen), V-expr gap +0.206 (moderate-strong), perm p=0.000. BEHAVIORAL: Paraphrase disruption UNINFORMATIVE (<<EXPR=RESULT>> confound — 100% accuracy even with gibberish). Needs plain-text redesign.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: 2 families for computation-position probing.
